channel.title: Victor Ndunda — Blog
channel.description: AI Engineer building multi-agent intelligence systems and agricultural AI in Nairobi, Kenya.

item.title: AgentReplay: Deterministic Replay and Counterfactual Debugging for AI Agent Reliability
item.description: A research-backed whitepaper on AgentReplay — an open-source deterministic replay and counterfactual debugging layer for AI agents. Bit-exact replay with zero model calls. 0.67% overhead, 100% reproduction fidelity.
item.content:encoded:
A research-backed whitepaper on AgentReplay — an open-source deterministic replay and counterfactual debugging layer for AI agents. Bit-exact replay with zero model calls. 0.67% overhead, 100% reproduction fidelity.

Read time: 22 min · Word count: 4200

Read full article →
item.author: mututandunda@gmail.com (Victor Ndunda)

item.title: Building a 50-Agent Multi-Agent DAG Pipeline
item.description: How I designed and built Busara AI's 7-stage parallel DAG pipeline with 50 specialized agents — from Kahn's topological sort to circuit breakers and O(1) LRU caching.
item.content:encoded:
How I designed and built Busara AI's 7-stage parallel DAG pipeline with 50 specialized agents — from Kahn's topological sort to circuit breakers and O(1) LRU caching.

Read time: 12 min · Word count: 2400

Read full article →
item.author: mututandunda@gmail.com (Victor Ndunda)

item.title: KilimoPRO: AI for 5 Million Kenyan Farmers
item.description: Designing agricultural intelligence that works offline on low-end Android phones. Integrating KilimoSTAT, FAOSTAT, Google Earth Engine, and KALRO data.
item.content:encoded:
Designing agricultural intelligence that works offline on low-end Android phones. Integrating KilimoSTAT, FAOSTAT, Google Earth Engine, and KALRO data.

Read time: 15 min · Word count: 3000

Read full article →
item.author: mututandunda@gmail.com (Victor Ndunda)

item.title: Lessons from China's National Smart Agriculture Action Plan
item.description: What Kenya can learn from China's space-air-ground monitoring networks, large agricultural models, and the 2024-2028 smart agriculture framework.
item.content:encoded:
What Kenya can learn from China's space-air-ground monitoring networks, large agricultural models, and the 2024-2028 smart agriculture framework.

Read time: 10 min · Word count: 2000

Read full article →
item.author: mututandunda@gmail.com (Victor Ndunda)

item.title: Real Math, Not Vibes: Statistical Algorithms in TypeScript
item.description: Holt-Winters triple exponential smoothing, OLS regression via normal equation, K-Means++ with silhouette scoring — all from scratch in TypeScript.
item.content:encoded:
Holt-Winters triple exponential smoothing, OLS regression via normal equation, K-Means++ with silhouette scoring — all from scratch in TypeScript.

Read time: 18 min · Word count: 3600

Read full article →
item.author: mututandunda@gmail.com (Victor Ndunda)

item.title: The Multi-LLM Council: When One AI Isn't Enough
item.description: How KilimoPRO uses 5 expert AI personas (agronomist, economist, climate scientist, extension officer, risk manager) to deliberate complex farming decisions.
item.content:encoded:
How KilimoPRO uses 5 expert AI personas (agronomist, economist, climate scientist, extension officer, risk manager) to deliberate complex farming decisions.

Read time: 8 min · Word count: 1600

Read full article →
item.author: mututandunda@gmail.com (Victor Ndunda)

item.title: Quantitative Finance for Agricultural Markets
item.description: Applying EWMA volatility, GARCH(1,1), Value at Risk (VaR), and RSI from financial markets to agricultural commodity price forecasting.
item.content:encoded:
Applying EWMA volatility, GARCH(1,1), Value at Risk (VaR), and RSI from financial markets to agricultural commodity price forecasting.

Read time: 14 min · Word count: 2800

Read full article →
item.author: mututandunda@gmail.com (Victor Ndunda)

item.title: 22 Data Sources for Kenyan Agricultural Intelligence
item.description: A comprehensive inventory of verified, operational data APIs: KilimoSTAT, FAOSTAT, KALRO, Google Earth Engine, Sentinel-2, CHIRPS, ARDC, and more.
item.content:encoded:
A comprehensive inventory of verified, operational data APIs: KilimoSTAT, FAOSTAT, KALRO, Google Earth Engine, Sentinel-2, CHIRPS, ARDC, and more.

Read time: 11 min · Word count: 2200

Read full article →
item.author: mututandunda@gmail.com (Victor Ndunda)

item.title: On-Device Crop Disease Detection with TensorFlow Lite
item.description: Training MobileNetV3 on the PlantVillage dataset, quantizing to int8, and running inference on low-end Android phones — completely offline.
item.content:encoded:
Training MobileNetV3 on the PlantVillage dataset, quantizing to int8, and running inference on low-end Android phones — completely offline.

Read time: 13 min · Word count: 2600

Read full article →
item.author: mututandunda@gmail.com (Victor Ndunda)

item.title: NASIP 2026-2030: The KES 1.08 Trillion Opportunity
item.description: Deep analysis of Kenya's National Agri-Food Systems Investment Plan and how technology platforms can operationalize its 9 flagship programs.
item.content:encoded:
Deep analysis of Kenya's National Agri-Food Systems Investment Plan and how technology platforms can operationalize its 9 flagship programs.

Read time: 16 min · Word count: 3200
